verses.2: The kings of the earth take a stand,
verses.4: He who sits in the heavens will laugh.
verses.5: Then he will speak to them in his anger,
verses.6: “Yet I have set my King on my holy hill of Zion.”
verses.7: I will tell of the decree:
verses.8: Ask of me, and I will give the nations for your inheritance,
verses.9: You shall break them with a rod of iron.
verses.10: Now therefore be wise, you kings.
verses.12: Give sincere homage to the Son, lest he be angry, and you perish on the way,
